V-M-009.checks: User frontend still builds, matches the Phase-28 auth API response shape, and makes registration mobile-safe without implying active KrotPN trial before email verification.
V-M-009.commands: pass-local 2026-06-03: cd frontend && npm run build; node scripts/phase52-matrix-visual-smoke.mjs; Chrome user /login screenshots at 360x740, 390x844, 430x932, 1440x900, and reduced-motion 390x844
V-M-009.anchors: TYPESCRIPT_NO_ERRORS REGISTER_PENDING_STATE REGISTER_VERIFIED_SUCCESS REGISTER_EXPIRED_LINK REGISTER_RESEND_AVAILABLE PHASE45_SUBSCRIPTION_COUNTDOWN PHASE46_PASSWORD_EXAMPLE PHASE46_MTPROTO_LINKS PHASE51_BRAND_ASSETS PHASE52_MATRIX_VISUAL_SHELL PHASE53_USER_MATRIX_ROUTES

phase-28-frontend-gates.gate-1: Register submit handles pending/check-email response without storing access tokens or marking the user authenticated.
phase-28-frontend-gates.gate-2: Verify-email route handles success, expired token, replayed token, and resend-needed states with compact mobile layouts.
phase-28-frontend-gates.gate-3: Frontend copy clearly states that free trial and VPN config become available after email verification.
phase-28-frontend-gates.gate-4: Existing login, refresh, logout, dashboard, config, and subscription flows continue to build against the shared API client.

phase-44-frontend-gates.gate-1: Register pending state includes spam-folder guidance and removes stale 3-day trial/immediate VPN copy.
phase-44-frontend-gates.gate-2: Forgot/reset password routes exist and bind to the Phase-44 auth API methods.
phase-44-frontend-gates.gate-3: Client-side password strength hints match the backend minimum policy shape.
phase-44-frontend-gates.gate-4: Duplicate-email errors show a recovery CTA.

phase-45-frontend-gates.gate-1: Dashboard shows pending trial as config-access state without claiming the countdown has started.
phase-45-frontend-gates.gate-2: Subscription page renders server-derived days/hours/minutes and active date range.
phase-45-frontend-gates.gate-3: Subscription calendar highlights active dates and does not show stale 3-day trial copy.

phase-46-frontend-gates.gate-1: Register form renders a format-only password example imported from the shared password policy helper.
phase-46-frontend-gates.gate-2: Dashboard separates Telegram app tg://proxy link from browser https://t.me proxy link.
phase-46-frontend-gates.gate-3: MTProto visible labels are localized as Ссылка, Сервер, Порт, and Секрет.
phase-46-frontend-gates.gate-4: MTProto status badge refresh is bounded at 30 seconds and avoids background polling.

phase-51-frontend-gates.gate-1: User frontend index.html references real favicon.ico and 16x16/32x32 PNG favicon fallbacks.
phase-51-frontend-gates.gate-2: Vite PWA includes existing favicon and apple-touch-icon assets without referencing missing mask-icon.svg.
phase-51-frontend-gates.gate-3: User frontend public build contains pwa-192x192.png, pwa-512x512.png, and brand/email-logo.png.
phase-51-frontend-gates.gate-4: No visible page logo is added before the planned frontend redesign phase.

phase-52-frontend-gates.gate-1: App mounts VisualShell around the existing user route tree without changing route structure, auth state, or API clients.
phase-52-frontend-gates.gate-2: MatrixBackground renders a fixed pointer-events-none canvas with resize, cleanup, fallback, and reduced-motion guards.
phase-52-frontend-gates.gate-3: User index.css exposes Matrix tokens, scanline/vignette/content layers, focus-visible rules, and reduced-motion policy.
phase-52-frontend-gates.gate-4: Chrome mobile/desktop screenshots show the login shell remains readable above the Matrix layer.

phase-53-frontend-gates.gate-1: Auth screens keep existing API calls, spam hint, duplicate-email recovery CTA, password example, reset-token handling, and verification states while adopting Matrix forms.
phase-53-frontend-gates.gate-2: Dashboard, config, subscription, referrals, and settings routes build and render under VisualShell without route changes or API shape changes.
phase-53-frontend-gates.gate-3: Phase-53 smoke must check 360x740, 390x844, 430x932, 768x1024, and 1440x900 viewports for no document-level horizontal scroll and no obvious text/control overlap.
phase-53-frontend-gates.gate-4: Chrome screenshots must cover auth, dashboard, config, subscription, referrals, settings, and reduced-motion dashboard state before Phase-53 can close.

phase-53-commands.command-3: Chrome screenshot audit for /login, /register, /, /config, /subscription, /referrals, /settings at mobile and desktop viewports, plus reduced-motion dashboard.
phase-53-commands.command-4: git diff --name-only -- install.sh deploy nginx docker-compose.yml

scenarios.scenario-1: Registration shows check-email state and no authenticated dashboard redirect.
scenarios.scenario-2: Verification success routes the user into the normal authenticated onboarding path.
scenarios.scenario-3: Expired or replayed token state remains understandable and offers resend.
scenarios.scenario-4: Frontend builds with zero TypeScript errors.
scenarios.scenario-5: Password recovery screens build and static smoke passes.
scenarios.scenario-6: Phase-53 user route matrix renders Matrix style on auth, dashboard, config, subscription, referrals, and settings without changing API contracts.
scenarios.scenario-7: Matrix visual redesign hides primary VPN, MTProto, subscription, password recovery, or config actions on phone viewports.

V-M-009.evidence: 2026-06-01: cd frontend && npm run build and node scripts/phase44-auth-email-ux-smoke.mjs passed for Phase-44 password recovery UX. 2026-06-01: Phase-45 frontend build and subscription UX smoke passed for pending-trial copy, countdown fields, calendar marker, and stale 3-day copy guard. 2026-06-01: Phase-46 frontend build and user-cabinet UX smoke passed for password example, dual MTProto links, Russian labels, and bounded status refresh. 2026-06-02: Phase-51 frontend build passed and brand asset smoke --expect-dist confirmed favicon/PWA/email-logo assets in dist. 2026-06-03: Phase-52 frontend build, Matrix visual smoke, and Chrome screenshots for /login at 360x740, 390x844, 430x932, 1440x900, plus reduced-motion 390x844 passed.
